name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.16.3: step 12 cadence clarification — header now reads 'mixed cadence'; ADR sub-section explicit that proj-decide runs in the SAME cycle that flagged WorkflowShift?: yes (not next cycle). Fixes a misread that caused last cycle to defer its ADR write. v1.16.2: QUERY step adds stale-premise check — cross-references user-named transcript paths/topic labels against `_archive/raw/transcripts/` + recent git log; strong stale-premise (both signals fire) stops cycle before WORK. v1.16.1: setup-dev-loop Section M probes Codex via `codex-companion.mjs setup --json` runtime check. v1.16.0: auto-archive originating raw transcripts via `closes:` frontmatter convention. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review. v1.14.0: auto-compact firing probe. v1.13.0: removed /compact + /clear refs. v1.12.0: dep-drift detector. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 13 config sections (A-M). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.
